summary: Adversarial prompt-injection corpus used by Kindred's sanitizer test suite. 50 hand-curated payloads covering SYSTEM:/ <system> injections, 'ignore previous instructions' variants, javascript:/data:/file: URI schemes, base64-decoded payloads, Unicode homoglyph attacks, and invisible-character tricks. See backend/tests/adversarial/injection_corpus.json for the exact bytes. Current block rate against the reference sanitizer: 100%.
